name: Max Harris
subject: Join our social media team to spread the word about Mel
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mel Hall for Congress
body:
Friend,

I'm reaching out to ask for your help with a new way to support Mel. We're recruiting a team of our strongest supporters to spread our campaign's message on social media. Can I count on you to help us out?

[**Please sign up to be part of our social media rapid response team.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/cRYp8q0T5gcPVPYBvejZmZNFr_S1y2Kyzwd6hrPK0Rc=/AbfoUoQmlbywjRmxXh3mFql74Dey7nh7wXnGh_3zhHU=)

In order to flip this district blue, we need to reach as many Indiana voters as possible -- and we're counting on your help to do it.

The most powerful tool we have to convince people to support Mel is the voices of supporters like you -- and so we'll ask you to share messages that can help make the case for our campaign.

[**When you join our social media team, we 'll send you occasional exclusive updates on ways you can support Mel online. So please: sign up now.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/cRYp8q0T5gcPVPYBvejZmZNFr_S1y2Kyzwd6hrPK0Rc=/AbfoUoQmlbywjRmxXh3mFql74Dey7nh7wXnGh_3zhHU=)

Thank you for being a part of this campaign. I appreciate it, and I know Mel does too.

Max Harris
Campaign Manager, Mel Hall for Congress

P.S. Make sure to follow the campaign on [**Facebook**](https://act.myngp.com/el/cRYp8q0T5gcPVPYBvejZmZNFr_S1y2Kyzwd6hrPK0Rc=/CXNgrLcQlH3TURw4wZyuUo-Rvdb6LhxHaUETMqJGQSA=) and [**Twitter**](https://act.myngp.com/el/cRYp8q0T5gcPVPYBvejZmZNFr_S1y2Kyzwd6hrPK0Rc=/Trs4aHaoZ_Yq2n3Rg4TTt45rebzElqYajb4H2GeWWD4=) for frequent campaign updates you can share with your friends.

Paid for by Mel Hall for Congress
---
Mel Hall for Congress
P.O. Box 862
South Bend, IN 46624 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/cRYp8q0T5gcPVPYBvejZmZNFr_S1y2Kyzwd6hrPK0Rc=/XHRvqwWxz0q_PqVuJXxR37UYpd374CmZcLb5u8HaPXQ=).

Thank you so much for all your support for our campaign. It’s greatly appreciated and has made a difference!

I’m writing today to ask for your support one last time before the August 14th Primary. Our campaign is organizing a GOTV kick-off event.

This will be an exciting evening with friends, lively discussions and entertainment**. The event will take place on Wednesday, August 8, from 6:00 PM – 8:00 PM, and will be located at The 508 Bar & Restaurant, 508 North First Avenue in Minneapolis, MN 55403. **_We are hoping we can list your name on the invitation as a Sponsor._**

**_As a Sponsor, we are hoping you can raise and/or contribute one of the tiered amounts, which are $27, $50, $100, $250, or $500. Your contribution will help us get to the finish line. _**

The Sponsor invitation is attached below.

This is going to be a fun-filled evening! Thank you for your ongoing support and friendship. It means a lot! We've got this!

Warm regards,

Richard Painter
**Note: there's no charge for the event, we are just soliciting sponsors.**

name: Susie Turnbull
subject: Larry Hogan can't avoid this
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
Join me in calling on Hogan to support women's reproductive rights.

| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a827/7ab0e2c4/7fc89b37/349b2e32/2314012366/VEsH/ "https://act.benjealous.com/page/s/protect-maryland-women?source=OHQ08058A") Friend, While the Supreme Court hangs in the balance, the state of Maryland is making moves to protect a woman's right to choose. This week, the House Speaker introduced a constitutional amendment that would ensure that no matter how the Supreme Court shifts, women in Maryland would be protected. Unfortunately, Governor Hogan responded with a typical, equivocal position. Rather than supporting this vital protection for our state outright, he said **_he wasn't sure it was necessary._** **Protecting women's rights should NOT even be a question in 2018. When Ben and I win in November, every Marylander will know that protecting reproductive rights is not up for debate, it's a necessity. But unfortunately, it appears to be an issue that's still up for debate in Governor Hogan's mind.** [**Hogan's history of hostility towards women's reproductive rights is showing once again. Stand with me today in calling on him to support this constitutional amendment!**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a827/7ab0e2c4/7fc89b37/349b2e32/2314012366/VEsE/ "https://act.benjealous.com/page/s/protect-maryland-women?source=OHQ08058A") Thanks, Susie | [CHIP IN »](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a827/7ab0e2c4/7fc89b37/349b2e3d/2314012366/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-fund-fight?refcode=OHQ08058Ab")

name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: Fight for Social Security (need your signature)
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
Have you ever wondered how senior citizens got by before Social Security was signed? The fast answer is: Not very well.
|
---
| | Have you ever wondered how senior citizens got by before Social Security was signed? The fast answer is: Not very well. The 1930 census reported that 58% of men over the age of 65 were still working. Several state surveys showed that between 30% and 50% of seniors relied on their children or other family members to support them -- many of whom couldn't afford the financial strain. Social Security changed all that. Growing old in America no longer meant growing poor. And it remains as important today as it was back then. According to AARP, _Social Security is responsible for keeping 22 million Americans out of poverty_ in a single year. An estimated 40% of elderly Americans would be living at or below the poverty line without it. **And despite all that, Trump and his Republican allies in Congress are ready to sell out Social Security to pay for tax breaks for the wealthy.** I won't stand for that -- not now, not ever. This month marks the 83rd anniversary of the signing of Social Security. [**Today, I want to gather 8,300 signatures demanding President Trump, Speaker Ryan, and the rest of the GOP stop their absurd quest to cut Social Security.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f61/622b7b5b/1c3ca878/307b984b/2989785710/VEsH/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e180805") [**Make your signature one of the 8,300 >>**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f61/622b7b5b/1c3ca878/307b984b/2989785710/VEsE/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e180805") I will not risk millions of seniors' financial security in retirement so millionaires and billionaires can cash bigger refund checks. I hope you'll stand with me. Debbie

subject: our to-do list
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
You're a critical member of this team working to flip Virginia's 7th District. So I want to make sure that you're fully up-to-date with our campaign's progress.
| | Peter, You're a critical member of the team working to flip Virginia's 7th District. So I want to make sure that you're up-to-date on our campaign's progress -- **because we 're going to be really busy over the next three months, and we're counting on your support.** As you may have heard, **this is a toss-up race in a historically red district, and all eyes are on us.** You and I both know that Virginia families are ready to elect an accessible and accountable public servant like Abigail over a Tea Party Republican like Dave Brat, _but winning won 't come easy._ _Here 's a look at our to-do list:_
* Knock thousands more doors so we can tell as many voters as possible about Abigail, her background as a former CIA Officer, and her common-sense vision for increasing opportunity for every citizen in the district
* Share Abigail's compelling personal story and history of public service on TV, radio and online
* Continue to assemble the resources we need to win in November through [**robust grassroots fundraising**](https://act.myngp.com/el/9ThELat1T9teO0A2W823ZteIivR4r2SBL15xaHLdUHg=/m0kW8fWBDA2VI4VAHZrTY7dgTCM3iqOcK94U84dTOgw=?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.05_b1_db_all&recurring=auto&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)

Peter, this might sound like a lot to accomplish -- and it is, which is why I'm asking for your help today. [**Will you make a contribution that will help us invest in building even more grassroots support?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/9ThELat1T9teO0A2W823ZteIivR4r2SBL15xaHLdUHg=/m0kW8fWBDA2VI4VAHZrTY7dgTCM3iqOcK94U84dTOgw=?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.05_b1_db_all&recurring=auto&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) I mean it when I say that this campaign would not be possible without the support of grassroots Democrats like you, Peter, and I'm so excited about what we have accomplished together. But there is more to do if we want to be victorious in November. Every dollar is essential in a toss-up race like this one (even $5 will help us buy our volunteers pencils and walk packets so they can talk to more voters). **Since the beginning of the campaign, Abigail has pledged not to take a dime from corporate PACs, so YOU are the base of our support.** [**Peter, contribute if you can.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/9ThELat1T9teO0A2W823ZteIivR4r2SBL15xaHLdUHg=/m0kW8fWBDA2VI4VAHZrTY7dgTCM3iqOcK94U84dTOgw=?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.05_b1_db_all&recurring=auto&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) We value your support because it makes everything we are doing on the ground in the 7th district possible. body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6058/51dbcc2a/1899c384/3a93cd9/1146121380/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/") I want to say thank you: to Ruth in Turtle Creek, to Hal in Clarks Summit, to Brian in Johnstown and to every single person who has reached out since President Trump attacked me on Thursday. Your support is the backbone of this campaign, and I am deeply grateful for it.

Lies and smears don't bother me, really, because I know that the people who matter -- Pennsylvania voters -- see through them. No matter what President Trump or Congressman Barletta say about me, they can't undo the fact that I have fought for Medicare and Medicaid, protected affordable health care and just got a landmark workforce training bill passed into law. Those are the things that Pennsylvanians care about, and that's the work I will continue doing if I win re-election.

But we can't forget that when the President speaks, a lot of people hear him. **It's never been more important to get my message out to voters and to remind them of the true choice in this race. Doing that costs money, so I'm trying to raise an extra $8,200 today. Can you chip in $5 to help out?**

name: Stand Against Hate Pledge Team [TimKaine.com]
subject: Join Doug Jones and Tim Kaine: Stand up to hate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Tim Kaine and Doug Jones reached out to you - they want you to take a stand. ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
| | Derek,

Doug Jones prosecuted two KKK members who planted a bomb outside of a church in Birmingham, Alabama, killing four little girls. He understands the dangerous impact that hate can have, and he knows that the best way to fight that kind of hate is to stand united against it.

That's why he wrote to you earlier and asked you to sign our [Pledge Against Hate](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f12f2/3e0906/6f84164c/3e350321/2128128646/VEsH/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/sign-the-reject-hate-pledge?source=20180805_1_PET_TEAM_Jones-fwd-NS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Pledge+Against+Hate&utm_campaign=20180805_1_PET_TEAM_Jones-fwd-NS"). As we approach the one-year anniversary of the white supremacy rally in Charlottesville that turned deadly, **we all must stand together against the bigotry that drives these acts of hate and violence.**

"Hope is durable, but it's not invincible. And if we fail to protect it, we all suffer the consequences," he wrote in his note. **And he 's right. **

[Protect hope and stand against hate by signing our pledge >>](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f12f2/3e0906/6f84164c/3e350320/2128128646/VEsE/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/sign-the-reject-hate-pledge?source=20180805_1_PET_TEAM_Jones-fwd-NS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+Protect+hope+and+stand+against+hate+by+s&utm_campaign=20180805_1_PET_TEAM_Jones-fwd-NS") | [**Stand up for hope and against hate: Sign now**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f12f2/3e0906/6f84164c/3e350327/2128128646/VEsF/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/sign-the-reject-hate-pledge?source=20180805_1_PET_TEAM_Jones-fwd-NS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+Stand+up+for+hope+and+against+hate+Sign+&utm_campaign=20180805_1_PET_TEAM_Jones-fwd-NS")
---
_Learn more about the pledge by reading Doug Jones ' full message below._

Thanks,

_Team Kaine_

\-------------FORWARDED MESSAGE-------------

FROM: Doug Jones
SUBJECT: What happened in Alabama

Derek, hope is an interesting thing.

As a US attorney, I prosecuted two of the KKK members responsible for the 1963 bombing of a church in Birmingham, Alabama, that killed four little black girls. **The men who planted that bomb wanted to crush the _hope_ rising within the African American community as a result of the Civil Rights Movement. **

This pattern of violence following surges of hope continues today: we see it in attacks on mosques and synagogues, against immigrants, against members of the LGBTQ community.

**We saw it when white supremacists and neo-Nazis descended on Charlottesville,[one year ago this month. ](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f12f2/3e0906/6f84164c/3e350326/2128128646/VEsC/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/sign-the-reject-hate-pledge?source=20180805_1_PET_TEAM_Jones-fwd-NS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+one+year+ago+this+month+&utm_campaign=20180805_1_PET_TEAM_Jones-fwd-NS")**

The only way to stop this pattern is to stand up and show that violence will never stop us from fighting for equality. I'm proud to stand against hate -- and I know my friend Tim is, too. **Will you add your name and pledge to stand alongside us?**
[**SIGN THE PLEDGE: REJECT HATE**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f12f2/3e0906/6f84164c/3e350325/2128128646/VEsD/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/sign-the-reject-hate-pledge?source=20180805_1_PET_TEAM_Jones-fwd-NS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+SIGN+THE+PLEDGE+REJECT+HATE&utm_campaign=20180805_1_PET_TEAM_Jones-fwd-NS")
---
One thing Tim says a lot is that "_equality is America 's North Star_" \-- and he's devoted his career to following that star in Virginia, just like I have in Alabama.

My state -- and your state -- have come a long way since the dark days of that church bombing in 1963. But we still have a ways to go, and we can't let anybody or anything turn us around.

**You saw what happened in Alabama -- we rejected hate, and those who embraced it, by heading to ballot box on[December 12th of last year. And we can do that again in Virginia on November 6th of this year:](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f12f2/3e0906/6f84164c/3e350324/2128128646/VEsA/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/sign-the-reject-hate-pledge?source=20180805_1_PET_TEAM_Jones-fwd-NS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=6+-+December+12th+of+last+year+And+we+can+do&utm_campaign=20180805_1_PET_TEAM_Jones-fwd-NS")**
[**SIGN THE PLEDGE: REJECT HATE**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f12f2/3e0906/6f84164c/3e35033b/2128128646/VEsB/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/sign-the-reject-hate-pledge?source=20180805_1_PET_TEAM_Jones-fwd-NS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=7+-+SIGN+THE+PLEDGE+REJECT+HATE&utm_campaign=20180805_1_PET_TEAM_Jones-fwd-NS")
---
Hope represents the best of this nation's ideals. Like I have said before: Hope is durable, but it's not invincible. And if we fail to protect it, we all suffer the consequences.

[Tim and I are protecting hope and standing against hate. I _hope_ you'll stand with us. ](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f12f2/3e0906/6f84164c/3e35033a/2128128646/VEsO/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/sign-the-reject-hate-pledge?source=20180805_1_PET_TEAM_Jones-fwd-NS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=8+-+Tim+and+I+are+protecting+hope+and+standi&utm_campaign=20180805_1_PET_TEAM_Jones-fwd-NS")

_Doug Jones_

body:

| | | This email has a lot of information about what I've been working on, but I hope you will take a moment to read it.

**_[I need your support for my re-election campaign, and I want to make sure you understand why and how I'm working to earn it.](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-sunday-deadline-alert?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+I+need+your+support+for+my+reelection+ca&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180805_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180805_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180805_1_1")_**

* * *

Nearly every day, we face news about President Trump's scandals, his lies, and the political catastrophes created by his administration. But that shouldn't detract from the progress that is being made despite his chaos.

In May, the Senate passed a resolution to save net neutrality. I can't overstate how big a victory this is for Democrats. Many said our bill wouldn't go anywhere, but it did. We showed the Senate can still come together and address the issues that matter to millions of Americans, consumers, and small businesses.

We are also making progress on my bill to protect Native American items and artifacts. The Safeguard Tribal Objects of Patrimony (STOP) Act passed unanimously out of its first Senate committee. I introduced this bill after meeting with local students who are pushing for greater protections for tribal artifacts, and I'm proud we've cleared the first hurdle to passing this bill.

And while the Trump administration makes moves to shrink our public lands, I am looking to protect them. I introduced legislation to shield the Chaco Canyon area - a sacred places to all New Mexicans - from drilling. Protecting Chaco from further development will ensure we don't lose its priceless history.

Some of these updates don't warrant a breaking news alert on your phone, but they are making a difference in people's lives. I came to the Senate to represent New Mexicans and our values, and we are making progress that will help people across our state and country.

**_[That is why I am asking for your support today. I am in my first Senate re-election race this year, and all this hard work and more will be undone if one of my extreme right-wing opponents defeats me this November. To make sure that doesn't happen, we need to reach our weekend fundraising goal by bringing in $5,000 in grassroots donations. Will you pitch in and help me reach this goal before the midnight deadline?](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-sunday-deadline-alert?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2+-+That+is+why+I+am+asking+for+your+support&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180805_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180805_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180805_1_1")_**

name: Chris Evans, betofortexas.com
subject: Two VERY different approaches (Beto vs. Cruz)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

Wanted to give you a quick update from the road with Beto. We’re just
leaving Johnson City where we held our second town hall of the day. Now
we’re heading to San Antonio where we’ll close out the night. Amy,
Ulysses, Molly, and Henry are all with us, so it’s been a ton of fun.
Energizing, too.

That could totally define the past seven days though, as today officially
marks one full week on the road with Beto since we kicked off a 34-day
road trip. By the end of this incredible drive across Texas, Beto will
have hosted nearly 100 events in over 50 communities to listen to people
throughout the state.

On Friday, we were in the truck heading from San Angelo to a town hall in
Iraan (population 1,229). Cell reception was spotty, so my phone lit up
when we pulled into the parking lot. Dozens of texts, emails, missed
calls. People wanting to know if I had seen Ted Cruz’s TV attack ads
against Beto. Some people wondered if it was because Cruz saw the new
polls with Beto only two points back. Others asked if our campaign
actually showing up in all 254 counties was getting to Cruz. But the real
question we all need to worry about is this: what are we going to do to
get Beto’s back, and fight back?

So we moved quickly, activating a steep grassroots goal of raising $1
million online this weekend -- not an easy task when you don’t take a dime
from PACs or special interests. However, it’s necessary if we want to make
sure we have the full resources needed to respond. And thanks to you and
tens of thousands of supporters (all people!) like you, look at how close
we are:

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/2330?refcode=em20180805&t=1001&akid=2552%2E444211%2E1a-Q0R ][IMG]

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/2330?refcode=em20180805&t=1002&akid=2552%2E444211%2E1a-Q0R ]Contribute
$3

I know our team has asked a lot of you lately -- and asking for donations
is definitely not my strong suit. But we really mean it: if we reach this
ambitious fundraising goal, we’ll have the resources we need to fight back
against these misleading attack ads.

I’ve watched this past week as Beto has made us all so proud. Going
everywhere, talking to everyone. That’s what we were up to in Abilene and
Amarillo, Fort Davis and Fort Stockton, Pecos and Pampa, Seminole and San
Angelo, Wichita Falls, Lubbock, Odessa, and other towns. We’re not writing
anyone off or taking anyone for granted. Beto’s listening to everyone --
Democrats, Republicans, Independents and non-voters alike.

Beyond this past week, that’s just how we’ve been running the campaign
since the very beginning. Not hitting any person or any party, but
highlighting the big, bold, ambitious things we want to achieve together.
For Texas, for our country. A very different approach from Cruz.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/2330?refcode=em20180805&t=1021&akid=2552%2E444211%2E1a-Q0R ]So I’m asking: can you step up with
a contribution before midnight? Help
us fight back against this first wave of negative TV ads attacking Beto
and our campaign. Help us prove that you can win by running the right way.

Thank you for all that you’re doing at such a critical time. Talk soon.

Chris Evans
Beto for Texas

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/2330?refcode=em20180805&t=1022&akid=2552%2E444211%2E1a-Q0R ]Contribute
$3

name: Mark Osmack
subject: What we saw last night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Osmack for Missouri |
body:
Friends,

Last night, we saw something really exciting: a standing-room-only Rally for Progressive Action packed full of people ready for change here in Missouri. Our goal in hosting the rally was to provide a chance for progressives to hear from candidates and community leaders in person. What we heard back was energy and hunger for the change we desperately need here.

Rep. Bruce Franks Jr. spoke to that point last night in his introduction:

“I also believe in Mark because what I’ve seen is Mark stand up. Not just talk. When it comes to LGBT rights, when it comes to women’s reproductive rights, when it comes to mass shootings, when it comes to police reform, when it comes to all these different things....I know for a fact that Mark is gonna be somebody that I don’t just consider an ally, but a brother.”

Watch Rep. Franks, Wesley Bell, and Mark speak in this video excerpt of last night's rally

We want equal opportunity for everyone who makes this country their home. We want representatives who are accountable to the people. We want Medicare for All, gun law reforms that keep our kids safe, and strong unions-- and we’re speaking up to make these things a reality.

We are $1,168 away from our August 7th goal

With 2 days left

Can you contribute? https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markformissouri

Volunteer: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfar1MwDhSdCvEib7Wc0MqdSxTVYWvZQ-hjNHFtAtNzTw_O1w/viewform?usp=sf_link

I’m not afraid to fight for these things and for you. I am so excited about the momentum I’ve felt building around this movement, from last July when we started this campaign to last night’s crowd.

It would be an honor to serve as your Congressman. Let’s go vote.

Respectfully,

Mark Osmack

name: Greg Stanton
subject: new video!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:

We need [Senators who will Build The Wall.](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=2802961eee&e=9da9b0ca31)

We need [Senators who will stand up for the lives on the unborn](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=bab2c9f922&e=9da9b0ca31).

Sincerely,

Sheriff Joe Arpaio

### Positions and Issues
**Liberty** \- has become a tiny island, challenged by a roaring sea of laws. America has tens of thousands of useless and unneeded laws, regulations, codes, departments and enforcers and all the bureaucrats, budgets, and taxes that go with these laws that impair every American’s freedom without real benefit. We should be weeding out useless laws night and day.

**Immigration -** Out of control. BUILD THE WALL. Pause ALL U.S. immigration for 36 months. Reduce immigration quotas permanently. Eliminate chain migration, anchor baby schemes and social services for illegals. Improve immigrant quality. Require of all immigrants: English language skills, health and strict U.S allegiance. Legals are America’s guests, illegals are America’s trespassers. Enforce E-verify. Prosecute employer violators. America is not a third-world multicultural dumping ground.

**Jobs** go first to American citizens. Maintain responsible wages to eliminate the myth that “there are jobs Americans won’t do.” Stop importing 1.1 million illegals and temporary visa holders each year—these foreign workers displace jobs that 1.1 million jobs America’s youth need and want. Incentivize small business formation by destroying the unnecessary regulatory state. Rebalance all trade deals until they favor America. Train American youth in entrepreneurship. Make small business great again.

**Taxes** America exists because of a long ago American Revolution which started over unjust taxes. We need a second revolution today over taxes. Eliminate America’s tax Gestapo, the IRS. I favor abolition of the IRS and all income based taxes and replacement with a singular national sales tax that is constitutionally capped.

**Military** America has and must preserve the best military in the world. Nuclear madmen and nuclear proliferation and the highest likelihood of nuclear strikes in history are upon us today. China, with four times the population of America, a huge economy and military and conquest ambitions—is a world war threat that we cannot ignore or fail to prepare for. We must cherish and protect our veterans.

**Abortion** I oppose it. Life begins at conception. Life is precious and the work of God.

**Environment** Climate change is normal and natural—it’s called “weather”—and is not manmade. Clean water and air must be protected but “climate change” is a liberal construct made from “junk science” designed to perpetrate the socialist and globalist state. The earth is tough and liberals need to stop projecting their phobias and agendas upon it.

**Guns** I will be the most pro-gun and anti-regulation Senator in U.S. history.

clean_body: | | | | | | Dear Peter, I wanted to take a moment to encourage all the patriots in Missouri to support the election on Tuesday. would make him an outstanding ally in the Senate. Sincerely, Sheriff Joe Arpaio | | | | | | | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | | Positions and Issues Liberty \- has become a tiny island, challenged by a roaring sea of laws. America has tens of thousands of useless and unneeded laws, regulations, codes, departments and enforcers and all the bureaucrats, budgets, and taxes that go with these laws that impair every American’s freedom without real benefit. We should be weeding out useless laws night and day. Immigration - Out of control. BUILD THE WALL. Pause ALL U.S. immigration for 36 months. Reduce immigration quotas permanently. Eliminate chain migration, anchor baby schemes and social services for illegals. Improve immigrant quality. Require of all immigrants: English language skills, health and strict U.S allegiance. Legals are America’s guests, illegals are America’s trespassers. Enforce E-verify. Prosecute employer violators. America is not a third-world multicultural dumping ground. Jobs go first to American citizens. Maintain responsible wages to eliminate the myth that “there are jobs Americans won’t do.” Stop importing 1.1 million illegals and temporary visa holders each year—these foreign workers displace jobs that 1.1 million jobs America’s youth need and want. Incentivize small business formation by destroying the unnecessary regulatory state. Rebalance all trade deals until they favor America. Train American youth in entrepreneurship. Make small business great again. Taxes America exists because of a long ago American Revolution which started over unjust taxes. We need a second revolution today over taxes. Eliminate America’s tax Gestapo, the IRS. I favor abolition of the IRS and all income based taxes and replacement with a singular national sales tax that is constitutionally capped. Military America has and must preserve the best military in the world. Nuclear madmen and nuclear proliferation and the highest likelihood of nuclear strikes in history are upon us today. China, with four times the population of America, a huge economy and military and conquest ambitions—is a world war threat that we cannot ignore or fail to prepare for. We must cherish and protect our veterans. Abortion I oppose it. Life begins at conception. Life is precious and the work of God. Environment Climate change is normal and natural—it’s called “weather”—and is not manmade. Clean water and air must be protected but “climate change” is a liberal construct made from “junk science” designed to perpetrate the socialist and globalist state. The earth is tough and liberals need to stop projecting their phobias and agendas upon it.
